description: Explicitly stating menu set pricing with itemized benefits breakdown to justify cost and communicate value clarity during promotional periods like Ramadan.
structural_recipe: Lead with restaurant name/location tag, state the themed menu offering (e.g., 'قائمة رمضانية'), announce per-person price in SAR as anchor point, then itemize 3-5 included components using bullet points or line breaks. Include visual of plated dishes or table setting. Tag relevant accounts for visibility.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value transparency and explicit value calculation. Breaking down what's included at a stated price reduces purchase friction and leverages Ramadan's emphasis on community dining and collective value. Price anchoring in SAR creates immediate mental math confidence.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing transparency expectations are Saudi-specific; adapt to local currency expectations in other markets
Ramadan timing sensitivity—pattern assumes seasonal promotional context
F&B-specific pattern; may not translate to retail or services without significant adaptation
Low engagement observation suggests pattern alone insufficient without strong visual execution or account follower base
cultural_constraints: Must respect Ramadan context if used during Islamic month
Pricing in SAR expected; foreign currency signals lower localization
Family-style dining emphasis aligns with Saudi social dining norms
